channel.title: Hugo on m0nkeyc0de's brain dump
channel.description: Recent content in Hugo on m0nkeyc0de's brain dump

item.title: Hugo Cheat Sheet
item.description: Quick command reference for using Hugo day to day. Run in local hugo server ---debug Add a post with hugo command hugo new posts/hugo_cheat_sheet.md Add a post manually in contents/posts/new_post.md --- title: "New Post" date: 2024-01-21T10:08:53+01:00 slug: 2024-01-21-dirty_bytes type: posts draft: true categories: - default tags: - default ---
